name: crap
description: Change Risk Anti Patterns analysis for codebases, diffs, and feature work.

interface.shortDescription: Map change risk before refactors, migrations, or releases.
interface.longDescription: Packages a report-only workflow for spotting Change Risk Anti Patterns across codebases, diffs, staged changes, and planned refactors, with evidence-backed findings about blast radius, verification gaps, and safer next moves.
defaultPrompt: Before I refactor this area, map the highest change-risk anti-patterns and tell me what to de-risk first.
Review my staged changes for blast radius, verification gaps, and rollout risk.
I want to consolidate these modules; tell me where coupling or missing tests are most likely to bite.
